food_pairing.name: Blanc de Blancs Champagne with oysters
food_pairing.pairing: Grand Cru Blanc de Blancs with raw oysters and shellfish
food_pairing.description: The classic Champagne pairing: a chalky, saline Chardonnay-only cuvee meets the brine of raw oysters, the wine's racy acidity scrubbing the palate clean between each shell.

food_pairing.name: Brut NV Champagne with fried chicken and gougeres
food_pairing.pairing: Non-vintage brut with fried chicken, gougeres and salty fried snacks
food_pairing.description: A fruit-led brut against fried, salty food is a sommelier favourite: the bubbles and acidity cut through fat and batter while the wine's ripe fruit keeps the match generous.

food_pairing.name: Rose Champagne with charcuterie
food_pairing.pairing: Rose Champagne with cured meats and pate en croute
food_pairing.description: Rose Champagne's vinous red-fruit grip and gentle spice frame the salt and fat of charcuterie and a buttery pate en croute, the acidity resetting the palate.

food_pairing.name: Prestige Champagne with roast poularde
food_pairing.pairing: Vintage prestige cuvee with roast poularde and morels
food_pairing.description: A mature, vinous prestige cuvee meets roast poultry with mushrooms: the wine's brioche, smoke and stone-fruit depth echo the roasted skin while acidity lifts the cream and morels.

food_pairing.name: Blanc de Blancs with cheese souffle
food_pairing.pairing: Chardonnay-led Champagne with souffle au fromage
food_pairing.description: The airy lift and creamy texture of a cheese souffle mirror a fine Chardonnay-led Champagne, the wine's chalk and acidity keeping the rich egg and cheese fresh.

food_pairing.name: Oak-aged brut with Comte and a croque monsieur
food_pairing.pairing: Oak-influenced brut with aged Comte and a croque monsieur
food_pairing.description: Oak-influenced, reserve-rich brut has the walnut and toast depth to meet aged Comte and a molten croque monsieur, the wine's acidity cutting the cheese and bechamel.

food_pairing.name: Rose and fruit-led Champagne with tarte tatin
food_pairing.pairing: Fruit-forward rose Champagne with tarte tatin and fruit desserts
food_pairing.description: A fruit-forward rose Champagne echoes the caramelised apple of a tarte tatin, its red-berry lift and acidity balancing the dessert's buttery sweetness.

food_pairing.name: Pinot Meunier grower Champagne with mushrooms
food_pairing.pairing: Meunier-led grower Champagne with mushroom and earthy dishes
food_pairing.description: Vinous, oak-framed Pinot Meunier grower Champagnes carry smoke and orchard-fruit depth that flatters earthy mushroom dishes and roast poultry with morels.
